TriggerProps.Trigger_Body: CREATE TRIGGER tI_CAMPA AFTER INSERT ON CAMPAIGN REFERENCING NEW AS NEW FOR EACH ROW MODE DB2SQL WHEN ((0 = (SELECT count(*) FROM APP.PROMOTION WHERE new.promotion_id = APP.PROMOTION.promotion_id AND new.promotion_start = APP.PROMOTION.start_date)) ) BEGIN ATOMIC SIGNAL SQLSTATE '75001' ('Cannot insert APP.CAMPAIGN because APP.PROMOTION does not exist.'); END !!

TriggerProps.Name: tD_CUSTOMER
TriggerProps.Trigger_Body:
CREATE TRIGGER tD_CUSTO AFTER DELETE ON CUSTOMER REFERENCING OLD AS OLD FOR EACH ROW MODE DB2SQL WHEN (0 < (SELECT count(*) FROM APP.TRANSACTION_LOG WHERE APP.TRANSACTION_LOG.customer_id = old.customer_id)) BEGIN ATOMIC SIGNAL SQLSTATE '75001' ('Cannot delete APP.CUSTOMER because APP.TRANSACTION_LOG exists.'); END !!
CREATE TRIGGER tD_CUSTO AFTER DELETE ON CUSTOMER REFERENCING OLD AS OLD FOR EACH ROW MODE DB2SQL WHEN (0 < (SELECT count(*) FROM APP.ORDERS WHERE APP.ORDERS.customer_id = old.customer_id)) BEGIN ATOMIC SIGNAL SQLSTATE '75001' ('Cannot delete APP.CUSTOMER because APP.ORDERS exists.'); END !!

TriggerProps.Name: tI_ORDER_ITEM3
TriggerProps.Trigger_Body:
CREATE TRIGGER tI_ORDER AFTER INSERT ON ORDER_ITEM REFERENCING NEW AS NEW FOR EACH ROW MODE DB2SQL WHEN ((0 = (SELECT count(*) FROM APP.PRODUCT WHERE new.product_id = APP.PRODUCT.product_id)) ) BEGIN ATOMIC SIGNAL SQLSTATE '75001' ('Cannot insert OPS.ORDER_ITEM because APP.PRODUCT does not exist.'); END !!
CREATE TRIGGER tI_ORDER AFTER INSERT ON ORDER_ITEM REFERENCING NEW AS NEW FOR EACH ROW MODE DB2SQL WHEN ((0 = (SELECT count(*) FROM APP.ORDERS WHERE new.order_id = APP.ORDERS.order_id)) ) BEGIN ATOMIC SIGNAL SQLSTATE '75001' ('Cannot insert OPS.ORDER_ITEM because APP.ORDERS does not exist.'); END !!

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: PARENT UPDATE RESTRICT
PARENT UPDATE CASCADE
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: UPDATE %Child SET %JoinFKPK(%Child,%New," = ",",") WHERE %JoinFKPK(%Child,%Old," = "," AND")

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: PARENT UPDATE SET NULL
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: UPDATE %Child SET %SetFK(%Child,NULL) WHERE %JoinFKPK(%Child,%Old," = "," AND")

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: PARENT DELETE RESTRICT
PARENT DELETE CASCADE
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: DELETE FROM %Child WHERE %JoinFKPK(%Child,%Old," = "," AND")

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: PARENT DELETE SET NULL
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: UPDATE %Child SET %SetFK(%Child,NULL) WHERE %JoinFKPK(%Child,%Old," = "," AND")

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: CHILD INSERT RESTRICT
CHILD INSERT CASCADE
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: INSERT INTO %Parent (%ParentPK(",",)) SELECT %ChildFK(",",) FROM %New WHERE %NotnullFK(%New," IS NOT NULL",," AND") AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM %Parent WHERE %JoinFKPK(%New,%Parent," = "," AND"))

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: CHILD INSERT SET NULL
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: UPDATE %Child SET %SetFK(%Child,NULL) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM %Parent WHERE %JoinFKPK(%New,%Parent," = "," AND") )

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: CHILD UPDATE RESTRICT

Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: UPDATE %Child SET %SetFK(%Child,NULL) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM %Parent WHERE %JoinFKPK(%New,%Parent," = "," AND") )

Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: DELETE FROM %Parent WHERE %JoinFKPK(%Old,%Parent," = "," AND")

ViewProps.Name: VW_CUSTOMER_SUMMARY
ViewProps.SQL: CREATE VIEW APP.VW_CUSTOMER_SUMMARY ( customer_id, full_name, email, email_verified ) AS SELECT c.customer_id, c.full_name, c.email, c.email_verified FROM APP.CUSTOMER c;

ViewProps.Name: VW_ORDER_DETAIL
ViewProps.SQL: CREATE VIEW APP.VW_ORDER_DETAIL ( order_id, customer_id, order_date, order_amount, order_status ) AS SELECT o.order_id, o.customer_id, o.order_date, o.order_amount, o.order_status FROM APP.ORDERS o WHERE o.order_status IN ( 'OPEN' , 'PENDING' );

ViewProps.Name: VW_TRANSACTION_DAILY
ViewProps.SQL: CREATE VIEW APP.VW_TRANSACTION_DAILY ( txn_day, customer_id, txn_type, txn_count, total_amount ) AS SELECT DATE ( txn_date ) As txn_day, APP.TRANSACTION_LOG.customer_id, APP.TRANSACTION_LOG.txn_type, COUNT ( * ) As txn_count, SUM ( txn_amount ) As total_amount FROM APP.TRANSACTION_LOG GROUP BY DATE ( txn_date ) , customer_id , txn_type;
